title: Session Start Protocol
description: Every agent session must detect the user role and check environment capabilities before proceeding.

statements.label: Detect user role
statements.requirement: The agent MUST determine the user's role at session start by checking identity sources against the role assignment table.

statements.label: Check environment capabilities
statements.requirement: The agent MUST probe for all capabilities referenced by skills the user's role can access.

statements.label: Check open todos
statements.requirement: The agent SHOULD check for open todos and present a summary to the user.
